ast.target: 无法将消息解析为 JSON：

ast.name: error
ast.source: [Langfuse SDK] Error while shutting down Langfuse
ast.target: [Langfuse SDK] 关闭 Langfuse 时出错

ast.name: error
ast.target: 重新初始化 LLM 时出错：

ast.name: error
ast.target: 初始化 LLM 时出错：

ast.name: log
ast.source: [WARNING]: Received non-string content from OpenAI. This is currently not supported.
ast.target: [警告]：从 OpenAI 收到非字符串内容。目前不支持此操作。

ast.name: log
ast.source: Failed to parse error response as JSON
ast.target: 无法将错误响应解析为 JSON

ast.name: log
ast.target: 正在从响应中获取文本

ast.name: log
ast.source: Failed to get text from error response
ast.target: 无法从错误响应中获取文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Pick the model you would like to use

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override the default base URL for the model's API.
ast.target: 覆盖模型 API 的默认基础 URL。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled all tags will be generated with lowercase characters.
ast.target: 如果启用，所有标签将使用小写字符生成。

ast.name: warn
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 收到无法序列化的值。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith received circular JSON. This will decrease tracer performance.
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 收到循环 JSON。这将降低跟踪器性能。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: LangSmith failed to fetch info on supported operations. Falling back to single calls and default limits.
ast.target: [警告]：LangSmith 无法获取支持的操作信息。回退到单次调用和默认限制。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to calculate number of tokens, falling back to approximate count
ast.target: 无法计算令牌数量，回退到近似计数

ast.name: warn
ast.source: [WARNING]: OpenAI o1 models do not yet support token-level streaming. Streaming will yield single chunk.
ast.target: [警告]：OpenAI o1 模型尚不支持令牌级流式传输。流式传输将产生单个数据块。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: The "tool_calls" field on a message is only respected if content is a string.
ast.target: 消息上的“tool_calls”字段仅在内容为字符串时才被尊重。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: response.functionCall() is deprecated. Use response.functionCalls() instead.
ast.target: response.functionCall() 已弃用。请改用 response.functionCalls()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: shutdown() is deprecated. It does not wait for all events to be processed. Please use shutdownAsync() instead.
ast.target: shutdown() 已弃用。它不会等待所有事件处理完毕。请改用 shutdownAsync()。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Langfuse is disabled. No observability data will be sent to Langfuse.
ast.target: Langfuse 已禁用。不会向 Langfuse 发送任何可观测性数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Langfuse secret key was not passed to constructor or not set as 'LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY' environment variable. No observability data will be sent to Langfuse.
ast.target: Langfuse 密钥未传递给构造函数或未设置为 'LANGFUSE_SECRET_KEY' 环境变量。不会向 Langfuse 发送任何可观测性数据。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Langfuse public key was not passed to constructor or not set as 'LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY' environment variable. No observability data will be sent to Langfuse.
ast.target: Langfuse 公钥未传递给构造函数或未设置为 'LANGFUSE_PUBLIC_KEY' 环境变量。不会向 Langfuse 发送任何可观测性数据。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to reinitialize LLM. Please check your settings and API keys.
ast.target: 重新初始化 LLM 失败。请检查您的设置和 API 密钥。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to initialize LLM. Please check your settings and API keys.
ast.target: 初始化 LLM 失败。请检查您的设置和 API 密钥。

ast.name: description
ast.target: 从 .env 文件加载环境变量
